title: Debu dan Kisah yang Terlupa
theme: Melalui proses membereskan barang-barang lama di rumah, seorang individu menemukan makna mendalam dalam rutinitas dan mencapai self-discovery tentang pentingnya persahabatan yang pernah terlupakan.

cover.prompt: A still life composition in a quiet, sunlit room corner. A tall stack of old, dust-covered cardboard boxes rests undisturbed, illuminated by gentle, warm natural light streaming from an unseen window. Fine dust motes are visible dancing in the air, creating a soft atmosphere. A closed laptop sits subtly on a table nearby, hinting at a workspace. The scene uses cinematic composition with the rule of thirds, employing a shallow depth of field to emphasize the textures of the boxes and the tranquil, introspective mood. The overall ambiance evokes a sense of forgotten memories and the gentle progression of moments.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, warm color grading

meta.plan_summary: A young freelancer, Arya, embarks on decluttering his 'storage' of old boxes, where he unearths letters and sketches from a long-lost childhood friend, Rama. This discovery triggers a deep reflection on past friendships, personal shortcomings, and the importance of self-forgiveness and acceptance. The process leads him to not only organize his physical space but also to find inner peace by confronting and releasing emotional burdens.
